nodes.label: Task verifiability enabling trust

nodes.label: AI task scope manageability

nodes.label: AI adherence to researcher-specified method

nodes.label: AI as supplement to creative process
nodes.label_negative: AI limited to implementation and assistance only
nodes.grounding_span: a tool that is smart enough to bounce complex ideas off of and have its own interesting ideas

nodes.label: Research integrity and accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: I have requested a certain method because I know it will work as intended

nodes.label: Scientific advancement and innovation
nodes.grounding_span: if AI was able to produce its own mathematical theorems and push the boundaries of science

nodes.label: Productivity and efficient task completion
nodes.grounding_span: It was a big project with a tight deadline

nodes.label: Cautious trust in AI

nodes.label: Aspirational hope for AI as practical assistant

nodes.label: Task decomposition into small verifiable steps

nodes.label: Experience-driven pragmatic calibration of tool use
